item.title: Open-Source Software Mirror Sites (China)
item.author: xwi88
item.description:
A collection of open-source software mirror sites in China. The recommended ones are preferred. You can also browse the public open-source mirrors or the education-network open-source mirrors directly.

Copyright notice: This is an original article by xwi88, licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0. Commercial use is prohibited; please cite the source when reposting. Follow at https://github.com/xwi88

Recommended mirrors

  • Huawei Open Source Mirror
  • Tencent Open Source Mirror
  • Alibaba Open Source Mirror
  • USTC (Univ. of Science and Technology of China) Open Source Mirror
  • TUNA (Tsinghua University) Open Source Mirror github
  • BFSU (Beijing Foreign Studies Univ.) Open Source Mirror
  • ZJU (Zhejiang University) Open Source Mirror
  • LZU (Lanzhou University) Open Source Community Mirror

Enterprise mirrors

  • Huawei Open Source Mirror
  • Tencent Open Source Mirror
  • Alibaba Open Source Mirror
  • NetEase Open Source Mirror

Education-network mirrors

MirrorZ — one-stop navigation for university open-source mirrors
